_comment: Apify 'Google Maps Scraper' actor (compass/crawler-google-places). Paste this into the actor's JSON input editor on apify.com. Bookkeeping/accounting sourcing, ~20mi Phoenix metro. Type x city matrix gives controlled radius coverage (Google caps ~120 results/search, so split by city). Est. ~40 searches x up to 120 = a few thousand raw rows before enrichment dedupes/filters.
_field_note: scrapeContacts pulls emails + socials from each place's website (extra credits but worth it for outreach). Set to false to save credits if you only want phone/website. scrapePlaceDetailPage must stay true to get website/phone/category reliably.
_alternative_radius_strategy: If you'd rather use a true circular radius instead of the city matrix, replace searchStringsArray with just the business types (no city) and add: "customGeolocation": { "type": "Point", "coordinates": [-111.9261, 33.3528], "radiusKm": 32 } — centered on Tempe/Chandler line (~Will's base), 32km ~= 20mi. The city matrix above is more reliable for coverage; the radius is cleaner geographically. Don't use both.
